title: Anatomy of a Linear Regression Equation
description: A visual breakdown of the components of the linear regression equation y = β₀ + β₁X₁ + ... + βₖXₖ + ε, explaining the statistical meaning and interpretation of each part.
relationships: Coefficient (βᵢ) is multiplied by Input Feature (Xᵢ)
All (βᵢ * Xᵢ) terms and Intercept (β₀) are summed to create Predicted Value (ŷ)
Error Term (ε) is the difference between Predicted Value (ŷ) and Actual Value (y)
